jobs.title: Staff Accountant [Remote-US]
jobs.content: <p><strong>Staff Accountant</strong></p><p>Quanata is the State-Farm-sponsored connected-mobility insurance-tech platform pioneered around the auto-telematics-risk-modeling data model & the connected-mobility segment.</p>

jobs.title: Actuary [Remote-US]
jobs.content: <p>Lead Quanata's actuarial function across the HiRoad / Drive Safe & Save / Steer / AI Insurance Studio platform.</p>
